name: Motion Plan
description: Assemble a MotionPlan from a list of PlanSteps (built upstream by Cf_TrajectoryStep / Cf_StateChangeStep). Threads the cell state through the chain, validates each step, and emits the assembled plan plus the composite EE planes/polyline for visualisation (one branch per trajectory step).

inputParameters.name: steps
inputParameters.description: Ordered list of PlanStep objects, typically from Cf_TrajectoryStep and Cf_StateChangeStep components.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: Optional RobotCell. When provided, a structural signature is stored on the plan so a mismatched cell on load can be detected via verify_cell().

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group name used for the FK visualisation. Defaults to the cell's main group.

inputParameters.name: description
inputParameters.description: Optional free-form description of the plan.

outputParameters.name: plan
outputParameters.description: The assembled MotionPlan. Serialisable via to_json / to_jsonstring.

outputParameters.name: planes
outputParameters.description: DataTree of Rhino planes — one branch per trajectory step, one plane per trajectory point. Flatten for a single combined list.

outputParameters.name: polyline
outputParameters.description: List of Rhino polylines — one per trajectory step, through the EE origins.

outputParameters.name: duration
outputParameters.description: Sum of trajectory durations along the realized path, in seconds. Backends that do not time their trajectories report 0.

outputParameters.name: end_state
outputParameters.description: RobotCellState at the end of the realized path.
